CancelContact.description: Grants permission to cancel a contact

CreateConfig.description: Grants permission to create a configuration

CreateDataflowEndpointGroup.description: Grants permission to create a data flow endpoint group

CreateDataflowEndpointGroupV2.description: Grants permission to create a data flow endpoint group using the V2 operation

CreateEphemeris.description: Grants permission to create an ephemeris item

CreateMissionProfile.description: Grants permission to create a mission profile

DeleteConfig.description: Grants permission to delete a config

DeleteDataflowEndpointGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a data flow endpoint group

DeleteEphemeris.description: Grants permission to delete an ephemeris item

DeleteMissionProfile.description: Grants permission to delete a mission profile

DescribeContact.description: Grants permission to describe a contact

DescribeEphemeris.description: Grants permission to describe an ephemeris item

GetAgentConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get the configuration of an agent

GetAgentTaskResponseUrl.description: Grants permission to retrieve presigned S3 logging URLs

GetConfig.description: Grants permission to return a configuration

GetDataflowEndpointGroup.description: Grants permission to return a data flow endpoint group

GetMinuteUsage.description: Grants permission to return minutes usage

GetMissionProfile.description: Grants permission to retrieve a mission profile

GetSatellite.description: Grants permission to return information about a satellite

ListConfigs.description: Grants permission to return a list of past configurations

ListContacts.description: Grants permission to return a list of contacts

ListDataflowEndpointGroups.description: Grants permission to list data flow endpoint groups

ListGroundStations.description: Grants permission to list ground stations

ListMissionProfiles.description: Grants permission to return a list of mission profiles

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

RegisterAgent.description: Grants permission to register an agent

ReserveContact.description: Grants permission to reserve a contact

TagResource.description: Grants permission to assign a resource tag

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to unassign a resource tag

UpdateAgentStatus.description: Grants permission to update the status of an agent

UpdateConfig.description: Grants permission to update a configuration

UpdateEphemeris.description: Grants permission to update an ephemeris item

UpdateMissionProfile.description: Grants permission to update a mission profile

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

groundstation:AgentId.description: Filters access by the ID of an agent

groundstation:ConfigId.description: Filters access by the ID of a config

groundstation:ConfigType.description: Filters access by the type of a config

groundstation:ContactId.description: Filters access by the ID of a contact

groundstation:DataflowEndpointGroupId.description: Filters access by the ID of a dataflow endpoint group

groundstation:EphemerisId.description: Filters access by the ID of an ephemeris

groundstation:GroundStationId.description: Filters access by the ID of a ground station

groundstation:MissionProfileId.description: Filters access by the ID of a mission profile

groundstation:SatelliteId.description: Filters access by the ID of a satellite
